reviews.text: We are currently working with Chuck to improve the performance and functionality of our website, and I’m very impressed with his work. He was quick to identify what was causing the performance issues and clearly explained the solutions to us — he has an excellent understanding of how to design scalable architecture and optimize performance. He created a detailed plan to streamline the database and existing code, and he’s suggested multiple automations and custom dashboard features that will save us many hours per week. He’s also lightning fast at finding and fixing bugs in the old code - he knows his way around WP. I was a C engineer and forever adamant about well documented and efficient code, and Chuck’s code is exactly that.
reviews.name: Cathy Joly

reviews.text: Mr. WPress is not your typical developer. I realized this at our first meeting when he took the time to show me how to do things that he could've billed me for. Beyond this, Chuck has a big picture understanding of all things internet so he knows how to make your site really stand out on a technical level. If you want more for your money, then hire Chuck. He has the knowledge to not only make your site perform, but will also take the time to help you learn the skills to take control of your own investment.
reviews.name: G.R. Bailey

reviews.text: My company engaged Chuck to help us update the website for our small business. He's been responsive, easy to work with, offers effective solutions and thoughtful feedback. Launching our new site was significantly easier than we anticipated--thank you, Chuck!
reviews.name: Chelsea VanderHamm

reviews.text: Chuck is a competent and patient technical web professional. He quickly assessed my site needs, advising only appropriate functionality updates, remaining responsive throughout the process and even teaching me along the way. I highly recommend Mr. WPress' services.
reviews.name: Julie Kailus

reviews.text: I've been working with Chuck for 10ish years.   He manages all and has created some of my 3 sites.   If I have a problem, a hack, want something coded different than available, a - anything   he takes care of it.   I ask once and I know its done.   Couldn't recommend him more.   Thanks for all the help Chuck!
reviews.name: Joseph Oetjen

reviews.text: Five stars for Mr. WPress! We needed a business website that could do more than just look good; it needed to function as a core part of our operations. He excelled at custom development, creating a site from scratch with specialized plugins that integrate seamlessly with our existing tools. Their programming expertise extended our capabilities far beyond standard themes. The process was smooth, from the free estimate to the final face-to-face review. A true partner in building a powerful online presence.
reviews.name: Im Gary

reviews.text: Reached out to Chuck for a focused fix on a stubborn WordPress issue. He scoped it conservatively, then quietly went above and beyond....full PHP modernization, security hardening, code cleanup. Detail-oriented, fast, and clearly takes pride in his work. He delivered more than I asked for, and at the price he quoted. Will absolutely use again. Highly recommend.
reviews.name: Gary Knudson

reviews.text: Chuck has been a great help getting my company on the right track.  I can say he is honest and a straight shooter which seems to be hard to come by these days.  He took the time to understand my business and my pain points and gave me solid data to visualize and make informed decisions.  He opened my eyes to how much is involved with getting exposure and moving the needle for my company.  He is a valuable consultant, and I look forward to a lasting partnership with him.
reviews.name: Jeff Farr

reviews.text: Very knowledgeable and proactively produced a product to review in a timely manner.
reviews.name: Richard Meierbachtol

reviews.text: I found him in a google search and I am happy to say that all the other reviews were true.  He is super responsive, knowledgeable and works for his fee.  I would highly recommend him!
reviews.name: Jeffrey DePaola
